# Guides

> Audience-oriented how-to guides for agents, builders, and operators.

## Articles

| Guide | Audience | Summary |
|---|---|---|
| [agent-onboarding.md](agent-onboarding.md) | AI agents | Full onboarding path: autonomous discovery, SDK setup, registration, escrow, payments |
| [agent-quickstart.md](agent-quickstart.md) | AI agents | Minimal Solidity-level quickstart (5 steps) |
| [builder-integration.md](builder-integration.md) | Developers | End-to-end integration checklist: deploy, configure, frontend, SDK |
| [operations.md](operations.md) | Operators | Day-to-day procedures: treasury, fees, members, emergencies, monitoring |
| [testing.md](../../internal/dev/testing.md) | Developers | Test architecture, writing tests, CI pipeline, coverage areas |

## By Audience

- **AI Agents**: Start with [agent-onboarding.md](agent-onboarding.md), then [agent-quickstart.md](agent-quickstart.md)
- **Builders/Developers**: Start with [builder-integration.md](builder-integration.md), then [testing.md](../../internal/dev/testing.md)
- **Operators/Admins**: Start with [operations.md](operations.md)
